case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. MARIA ANDREINA GODOY

docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GODOY, MARIA ANDREINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-30-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JOSEFINA FLORES LEGAL SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT MARIA ANDREINA GODOY IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MAXWELL PRITT; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
